case_title: CAESAR, MICHAEL vs. BRUDIGAM, NANCY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT BRUDIGAM, NANCY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUDIGAM, NANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 24 ALDER STREET 1ST FLOOR BEDROOM ADJACENT TO BATHROOM, STAYED UNTIL NOV-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. TO DISMISS ALL OTHER LEGAL CAUSES OF ACTION HE HOLDS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERS NEITHER PARTY TO ANNOY OR HARASS THE OTHER PARTY DURING THE SIXTY DAY PERIOD SUBJECT TO A CONTEMPT ORDER OF THE COURT.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAESAR, MICHAEL SERVED SEP-03-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUDIGAM, NANCY
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT BRUDIGAM, NANCY

10:25 A.M. C/C FOR CONTINUED SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT #8 VISITING JUDGE, DAVID OTIS. REPORTER, PATTY DOWLING. CASE SETTLED ON 9/24/93 DUE TO CONTINUANCE OF THE ACTION BY JUDGE DAVID OTIS. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISE LOCATED AT 24 ALDER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 1ST FLOOR BEDROOM ADJACENT TO THE BATHROOM STAY TO 11/30/93. DEFENDANT'S RENT DEPOSIT WILL PAY FOR OCTOBER 1993 RENT. DEFENDANT NANCY BRUDIGAM MAY STAY AT SUBJECT PREMISE THROUGH 11/30/93 WITHOUT PAYMENT OF RENT. PARTIES AGREEE THAT AS A CONSIDERATION FOR ENTERING INTO THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT NANCY BRUDIGAM, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CAESAR WILL DISMISS ALL OTHER CASES WHICH HE PERSONALLY HOLDS AGAINST DEFENDANT NANCY BRUDIGAM AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. THE COURT ORDERS THAT NEITHER PARTY SHALL HARRASS THE OTHER PARTY DURING THE SIXTY DAY PERIOD, SUBJECT TO A CONTEMPT ORDER OF THE COURT.
